CampaignAssistant.Title: AI Assistant
CampaignAssistant.ChatEmpty: Start a conversation to plan your campaign.
CampaignAssistant.WorldEmpty: No journal context is configured yet. Pin journals or adjust journal context settings to build your world summary.
CampaignAssistant.WorldTruncated: Some journal content was omitted due to length limits.
CampaignAssistant.WorldFollowUp: What part of your world would you like to develop next?
CampaignAssistant.WorldRefreshed: World summary refreshed from journal context.
CampaignAssistant.WorldRefreshedAi: AI world summary generated from journal context.
CampaignAssistant.SuggestionsEmpty: Ask Claude to plan NPCs, locations, or lore to see journal suggestions here.

Settings.ApiKeyHint: Stored locally in this browser only (not in the world database).
Settings.ApiKeySecureHint: Your API key is stored in this browser's local storage and is never written to the world database. It is still visible in browser devtools while a request is in flight, so use a dedicated key with usage limits.
Settings.ApiKeyMenuHint: Set or remove your Anthropic API key (stored locally in this browser).
Settings.ApiKeyConfigured: An API key is configured on this browser.
Settings.ApiKeyRequired: Enter an API key to save.
Settings.ApiKeyUnchanged: Existing API key kept (leave the field blank to keep the current key).
Settings.ApiKeyCleared: Anthropic API key removed from this browser.
Settings.ApiKeyMigrated: Your API key was moved from world settings to secure local storage on this browser.
Settings.ClearApiKeyConfirm: Remove the stored API key from this browser?
Settings.SystemPromptHint: Instructions sent with every request to shape Claude's behavior.
Settings.ContextLengthHint: Number of recent user/assistant turns to remember per session.
Settings.ChatEnabledHint: Allow /claude, /w claude, and /w gm-claude chat commands.
Settings.EchoToChatHint: Post query window responses as GM-only chat whispers.
Settings.UseCampaignAssistantHint: Use the two-column Campaign Assistant window for the scene control button and Ctrl+Shift+C. When disabled, opens the compact Claude Query window instead.
Settings.SuggestionsEnabledHint: When using Campaign Assistant, ask Claude to append structured journal suggestions you can accept or dismiss.
Settings.WorldSummaryModeHint: How Campaign Assistant builds the Your World So Far panel. Excerpt shows journal text only. AI always summarizes with Claude. Hybrid shows excerpts until you click refresh, then generates an AI summary (cached until journals change).
Settings.JournalContextEnabledHint: Adds journal text to the system prompt once per conversation (use New Conversation to refresh). Follow-up messages do not duplicate journal text in chat history.
Settings.JournalContextModeHint: Which journals to include. Use Custom Selection for folder and journal checklists. Pinned pages always override and are included regardless of mode.
Settings.JournalContextMenuHint: Choose folders and journals to include when using custom journal context mode.
Settings.JournalContextCustomHint: Included when mode is Custom selection. Folders include all journals inside them and subfolders.
Settings.JournalExcludeConversationLogHint: Omits the Claude Notes conversation log from API context (logging still appends each exchange). Reduces token use.
Settings.JournalContextMaxCharsHint: Maximum characters of journal text sent per request. Older or excess content is omitted.
Settings.JournalWriteEnabledHint: Append each question and answer to the module's Claude Notes journal.
Settings.ModelMigrated: Claude model updated from {from} to {to} (previous model is no longer available).

Journal.Created: Created the Claude Notes journal for conversation logging.
Journal.ContextHeader: [Foundry journal context — reference when answering; do not repeat verbatim unless asked]
Journal.ContextTruncated: [Additional journal content was omitted due to the character limit.]
Journal.PagePinned: Journal page pinned for Claude context.
Journal.PageUnpinned: Journal page unpinned from Claude context.

CLAUDE-MOD.NoApiKeyWarning: Configure your Anthropic API key via Configure API Key in Module Settings.

Errors.GmOnly: Only the GM can use Claude Query.
Errors.NoApiKey: Anthropic API key is not configured in module settings.
Errors.InvalidApiKey: Authentication failed. Check your Anthropic API key.
Errors.CorsBlocked: Browser access to the Anthropic API is blocked for this organization. Contact Anthropic support or use an API key from an org with browser access enabled.
Errors.InvalidModel: Invalid or retired Claude model ({detail}). Open Configure Settings → Claude Query and choose a current model.
Errors.InvalidModelGeneric: The configured Claude model was not found. Open Configure Settings → Claude Query and choose a current model.
